use_cases: Product or service showcase with animated card transitions
Interactive portfolio or project display cards
Content browsing with animated card stack interactions
Dynamic feature highlights with reorder animations
ai_summary: An animated card stack component featuring interactive card transitions with smooth exit/enter animations using Framer Motion. Displays product images, titles, and descriptions in a visually appealing stacked layout with scale and position animations. Supports dark mode and includes a call-to-action button for each card.
